title: The Planning Pattern
concept: Structuring upfront task decomposition and dynamic plan updating during execution.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of the Tool Use Pattern in AI agents?

options.text: It helps agents decompose tasks into smaller parts.
It standardizes how agents call and handle tools effectively.
It enables agents to learn new skills on their own.

exercises.explain: The Tool Use Pattern standardizes how AI agents interact with external tools, improving efficiency and reliability.

cards.title: Introducing the Planning Pattern
cards.body: The Planning Pattern helps AI agents break down tasks into smaller steps and adjust their plans as they work. This makes their actions more efficient and responsive!

cards.title: What is Task Decomposition?
cards.body: Task decomposition means breaking a big job into smaller, manageable tasks. This way, an AI can tackle each part step by step.

cards.title: Planning Like a Treasure Hunt
cards.body: Imagine you're on a treasure hunt. First, you look at the map (task decomposition) and figure out where to go. If you hit a dead end, you change your route (dynamic plan updating).

cards.title: Example of Planning in AI
cards.body: An AI agent organizing a party would first list tasks like sending invites, buying food, and decorations, then adjust if it finds a better store during the planning.

cards.title: Myth: Agents Only Follow Pre-made Plans
cards.body: Many believe AI agents stick to fixed plans, but they can update their strategies in real-time to adapt to new information!

cards.title: Visualization of Planning
cards.body: Planning involves dividing tasks and adapting as needed.

right.text: Adjusting plans based on new info.

exercises.prompt: What does dynamic plan updating allow an AI agent to do?

options.text: Stick to the original plan at all times.
Change its plan based on new information.
Ignore previous decisions and start over.
Only follow the tasks as they were originally set.

exercises.explain: Dynamic plan updating allows AI agents to adjust their plans if new information or obstacles come up, enhancing their flexibility and effectiveness.

exercises.prompt: Dynamic plan updating means an AI must always follow the original task plan without changes.
exercises.explain: False. Dynamic plan updating allows AI agents to alter their plans based on changing information.

exercises.prompt: The process of breaking a big task into small, manageable parts is called _____.
exercises.sentence: The process of breaking a big task into small, manageable parts is called task decomposition.
exercises.explain: The correct term, 'task decomposition', describes how complex tasks are simplified by breaking them into smaller parts.

exercises.prompt: Which of these statements is made by an AI agent demonstrating the Planning Pattern?

options.text: I will stick to the plan no matter what happens.
I am breaking down this project into smaller tasks to manage them better.
I won't change my approach; it's perfect as it is.

exercises.explain: The correct statement shows the AI is utilizing the Planning Pattern by decomposing tasks for better management and adaptability.

exercises.prompt: Which statement best summarizes the Planning Pattern in AI agents?

options.text: It focuses solely on completing tasks as they were initially set without changes.
It enables efficient task breakdown and timely updates to plans when new information arises.
It allows agents to ignore previous tasks and start new ones from scratch.
It emphasizes building tools rather than planning tasks.

exercises.explain: The correct answer highlights that the Planning Pattern combines the benefits of task breakdown and the ability to update plans dynamically, which is essential for adaptive performance in AI agents.
